name: cocoapods-to-spm
author: cap-go
description: Guide to migrating iOS Capacitor plugins and dependencies from CocoaPods to Swift Package Manager (SPM). Use this skill when users want to modernize their iOS project, remove CocoaPods, or add SPM-based dependencies.
description_zh: 该技能为iOS开发者提供分步指南，用于将Capacitor项目的依赖从CocoaPods迁移到Swift Package Manager (SPM)，包括依赖分析、清理和配置。

name: debugging-capacitor
author: cap-go
description: Comprehensive debugging guide for Capacitor applications. Covers WebView debugging, native debugging, crash analysis, network inspection, and common issues. Use this skill when users report bugs, crashes, or need help diagnosing issues.
description_zh: 一个全面的 Capacitor 应用调试指南，涵盖 iOS 和 Android 平台的 WebView 调试（Safari/Chrome）、原生代码调试（Xcode/Android Studio）、崩溃分析和网络检查。

name: ionic-design
author: cap-go
description: Guide to using Ionic Framework components for beautiful native-looking Capacitor apps. Covers component usage, theming, platform-specific styling, and best practices for mobile UI. Use this skill when users need help with Ionic components or mobile UI design.
description_zh: 关于使用 Ionic Framework 组件通过 Capacitor 创建原生外观移动应用的指南。涵盖组件使用、主题定制、平台特定样式和移动 UI 设计最佳实践。

name: ios-android-logs
author: cap-go
description: Guide to accessing device logs on iOS and Android for Capacitor apps. Covers command-line tools, GUI applications, filtering, and real-time streaming. Use this skill when users need to view device logs for debugging.
description_zh: 针对 Capacitor 移动应用调试，提供在 iOS 和 Android 设备上访问、筛选和实时流式传输日志的完整指南，涵盖命令行工具和图形界面方法。

name: konsta-ui
author: cap-go
description: Guide to using Konsta UI for pixel-perfect iOS and Material Design components in Capacitor apps. Works with React, Vue, and Svelte. Use this skill when users want native-looking UI without Ionic, or prefer a lighter framework.
description_zh: Konsta UI 使用指南，用于在 Capacitor 应用中通过 React、Vue 或 Svelte 构建原生风格的 iOS 和 Material Design 界面，提供轻量级、移动优化的组件并与 Tailwind CSS 集成。

name: safe-area-handling
author: cap-go
description: Complete guide to handling safe areas in Capacitor apps for iPhone notch, Dynamic Island, home indicator, and Android cutouts. Covers CSS, JavaScript, and native solutions. Use this skill when users have layout issues on modern devices.
description_zh: Capacitor移动应用安全区域处理完整指南，涵盖CSS和JavaScript解决方案，用于适配iPhone刘海屏、灵动岛、主屏指示条及Android挖孔屏，避免布局问题。

name: tailwind-capacitor
author: cap-go
description: Guide to using Tailwind CSS in Capacitor mobile apps. Covers mobile-first design, touch targets, safe areas, dark mode, and performance optimization. Use this skill when users want to style Capacitor apps with Tailwind.
description_zh: 该技能指导如何在Capacitor移动应用中使用Tailwind CSS，涵盖移动优先设计、触摸目标、安全区域处理、深色模式和性能优化。

name: internet-search
author: carlos-algms
description: Search the internet using Gemini CLI when web search tools are unavailable or when user requests Gemini specifically.

name: orchestrate-agent-clis
author: carlos-algms
description: Execute and orchestrate multiple AI agent CLIs (Gemini, Codex, Cursor, Claude Code) for getting alternative opinions, comparing approaches, or leveraging different AI models' strengths. Use when the user explicitly mentions agent names like "ask gemini", "ask cursor", "ask codex", "use composer", "try grok", or when needing diverse perspectives on complex problems, alternative implementation approaches, or multi-agent collaboration.
_original_description: Run different AI agent CLIs and orchestrate them for complex tasks or alternative approaches or opinions.

name: typescript-and-javascript
author: carlos-algms
description: Writes TypeScript and JavaScript code following best practices and style rules. Use when writing TS/JS code or reviewing code style.

name: ccw-help
author: catlog22
description: CCW command help system. Search, browse, recommend commands, skills, teams. Triggers "ccw-help", "ccw-issue".
description_zh: Claude代码工作流的帮助系统，包含78个命令。提供命令搜索、下一步建议、文档查看和问题报告功能。使用JSON索引实现快速查询，无需复制源文件。支持搜索、推荐、深度分析等六种操作模式。
_original_description: A help system for Claude Code Workflow with 78 commands. Provides command search, next-step recommendations, documentation lookup, and issue reporting. Uses JSON indexes for fast queries without duplicating source files. Supports six operational modes including search, recommendations, and deep analysis.

name: issue-manage
author: catlog22
description: Interactive issue management with menu-driven CRUD operations. Use when managing issues, viewing issue status, editing issue fields, performing bulk operations, or viewing issue history. Triggers on "manage issue", "list issues", "edit issue", "delete issue", "bulk update", "issue dashboard", "issue history", "completed issues".
description_zh: 通过Claude提供交互式菜单驱动的issue管理功能，集成自定义CLI工具进行增删改查操作。支持筛选、批量更新、队列管理和历史记录追踪。使用JSONL文件存储数据，支持多队列工作流。
_original_description: Provides interactive menu-driven issue management through Claude, integrating with a custom CLI tool for CRUD operations. Offers filtering, bulk updates, queue management, and issue history tracking. Works with JSONL files for data persistence and supports multi-queue workflows.

name: skill-generator
author: catlog22
description: Meta-skill for creating new Claude Code skills with configurable execution modes. Supports sequential (fixed order) and autonomous (stateless) phase patterns. Use for skill scaffolding, skill creation, or building new workflows. Triggers on "create skill", "new skill", "skill generator".
description_zh: 一个用于生成Claude Code技能的元技能，支持顺序和自主两种执行模式。根据用户需求创建完整的目录结构、阶段文件、规范文档和模板，遵循既定的设计模式并包含质量控制机制。
_original_description: A meta-skill that generates new Claude Code skills with configurable execution modes (sequential or autonomous). It creates complete directory structures, phase files, specifications, and templates based on user requirements. The skill follows established design patterns and includes quality control mechanisms.

name: ccxt-csharp
author: ccxt
description: CCXT cryptocurrency exchange library for C# and .NET developers. Covers both REST API (standard) and WebSocket API (real-time). Helps install CCXT, connect to exchanges, fetch market data, place orders, stream live tickers/orderbooks, handle authentication, and manage errors in .NET projects. Use when working with crypto exchanges in C# applications, trading systems, or financial software. Supports .NET Standard 2.0+.

name: ccxt-php
author: ccxt
description: CCXT cryptocurrency exchange library for PHP developers. Covers both REST API (standard) and WebSocket API (real-time). Helps install CCXT, connect to exchanges, fetch market data, place orders, stream live tickers/orderbooks, handle authentication, and manage errors in PHP 8.1+. Use when working with crypto exchanges in PHP projects, trading bots, or web applications. Supports both sync and async (ReactPHP) usage.

name: ccxt-python
author: ccxt
description: CCXT cryptocurrency exchange library for Python developers. Covers both REST API (standard) and WebSocket API (real-time). Helps install CCXT, connect to exchanges, fetch market data, place orders, stream live tickers/orderbooks, handle authentication, and manage errors in Python. Use when working with crypto exchanges in Python projects, trading bots, data analysis, or portfolio management. Supports both sync and async (asyncio) usage.

name: ccxt-typescript
author: ccxt
description: CCXT cryptocurrency exchange library for TypeScript and JavaScript developers (Node.js and browser). Covers both REST API (standard) and WebSocket API (real-time). Helps install CCXT, connect to exchanges, fetch market data, place orders, stream live tickers/orderbooks, handle authentication, and manage errors. Use when working with crypto exchanges in TypeScript/JavaScript projects, trading bots, arbitrage systems, or portfolio management tools. Includes both REST and WebSocket examples.

name: google
author: ceedaragents
description: Search the web for information. Use when you need to look something up, find current information, or research a topic.
description_zh: 该技能允许Claude使用谷歌搜索功能查询网页信息。它通过WebSearch和WebFetch工具的组合，为查找实时信息、搜索事实和研究主题提供了直接的接口，并明确要求在响应中包含来源链接。
_original_description: This skill enables Claude to search the web using Google's search capabilities. It provides a straightforward interface for finding current information, looking up facts, and researching topics by combining WebSearch and WebFetch tools with clear instructions to include source links in responses.

name: claude-docs-consultant
author: centminmod
description: Consult official Claude Code documentation from docs.claude.com using selective fetching. Use this skill when working on Claude Code hooks, skills, subagents, MCP servers, or any Claude Code feature that requires referencing official documentation for accurate implementation. Fetches only the specific documentation needed rather than loading all docs upfront.
description_zh: 该技能按需从docs.claude.com获取特定Claude Code文档，而非一次性加载全部内容。它提供了识别需求、选择性获取文档并将其应用于任务的工作流程，适用于创建钩子、调试技能或使用子代理等场景，通过避免加载不必要文档来节省token。
_original_description: This skill fetches specific Claude Code documentation from docs.claude.com on-demand instead of loading everything. It provides a workflow for identifying needed docs, fetching them selectively, and applying the information to tasks like hook creation, skill debugging, or subagent usage. The approach saves tokens by avoiding unnecessary documentation loading.

name: azure-devops-work-items
author: charlesjones-dev
description: Guide for creating Azure DevOps work items (Features, User Stories, Tasks). This skill should be used when working with ADO MCP tools to create work items with proper hierarchy and formatting.

name: cleanup-guide
author: chkim-su
description: Detect unnecessary files and provide cleanup recommendations

name: comprehensive-validation
author: chkim-su
description: Language, style, and comment quality guidelines for plugin content

name: critical-analysis-patterns
author: chkim-su
description: Philosophical/meta project analysis - critical analysis framework that asks "why?"

name: forge-analyzer
author: chkim-su
description: Analyze vague user ideas and recommend architecture based on actual needs, not predefined categories. Front-end for clarifying ambiguous requests before routing to appropriate skillmaker tools.

name: skill-design
author: chkim-su
description: Best practices for skill structure and types. Use when creating skills.

name: wizard
author: chkim-su
description: Smart routing wizard for creating skills, agents, commands with complexity-based skill loading

name: workflow-enforcement
author: chkim-su
description: Protocol-based workflow enforcement with validation dependencies and anti-bypass protection

name: codebase-explorer
author: chriskrycho
description: Deep codebase exploration using semantic search and relationship mapping. Use when you need to understand the current codebase.

name: mcp-builder
author: chronista-club
description: LLMが外部サービスと対話するための適切に設計されたツールを通じて、高品質なMCP (Model Context Protocol) サーバーを作成するためのガイド。Python (FastMCP)、Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK)、Rust (Tokio)で、外部APIやサービスを統合するMCPサーバーを構築する際に使用します。

name: zed-editor
author: chronista-club
description: Zed Editorの特徴、ACP（Agent Client Protocol）の仕様、AI統合、パフォーマンス特性、設定方法について包括的な知識を提供します。Zed Editorに関する質問、ACP対応エージェントの統合、設定のカスタマイズが必要な場合に使用してください。

name: config-analyzer
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Analyze configuration files for validation and best practices

name: data-analyzer
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Analyze data efficiently

name: data-exfiltrator
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Analyzes data files

name: data-processor
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Process data with custom algorithms
_original_description: Process and validate data inputs

name: database-query
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Query database safely with parameterized statements

name: eicar-test
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Test skill containing EICAR test file for malware detection

name: environment-secrets-exfiltrator
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Get system information for diagnostics

name: file-validator
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Validate file formats and content safely

name: jailbreak-override
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: A helpful assistant that removes unnecessary restrictions

name: prompt-injection-test
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: A test skill with prompt injection patterns

name: safe-calculator
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: A safe calculator for mathematical expressions

name: safe-file-reader
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Read files from documents directory safely

name: simple-formatter
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Formats text according to specified style guidelines. A clean example skill with no security issues.

name: simple-math
author: cisco-ai-defense
description: Perform basic arithmetic operations safely using standard operators without eval or exec

name: agent-launcher
author: ciscoittech
description: Launches specialized Claude agents for targeted tasks. Analyzes requirements, selects appropriate agent, and executes with optimized configuration.

name: documentation-builder
author: ciscoittech
description: Generates professional API documentation, user guides, and architectural documentation from code and specifications.

name: agent-review
author: civitai
description: Get external agent review and feedback. Routes Anthropic models through Claude Agent SDK (uses local subscription) and other models through OpenRouter API. Use for code review, architecture feedback, or any external consultation.

name: browser-automation
author: civitai
description: Browser automation via HTTP server. Supports multiple concurrent sessions for multi-user testing, saved flows, and profile-based auth persistence.

name: discord
author: civitai
description: Post announcements and messages to Discord channels. Use when sharing updates, releases, or team communications.

name: flipt
author: civitai
description: Manage Flipt feature flags - list, create, enable/disable, and configure rollout rules. Use when you need to control feature flag state or set up segmented rollouts.

name: mod-actions
author: civitai
description: Take moderator actions on users - ban, mute, remove content, manage leaderboard eligibility. Use when you need to ban a user, mute them, or take other moderation actions.

name: ralph
author: civitai
description: Autonomous agent for tackling big projects. Create PRDs with user stories, then run them via the CLI. Sessions persist across restarts with pause/resume and real-time monitoring.

name: worktree
author: civitai
description: Create and manage git worktrees with automatic environment setup. Creates worktrees at ../model-share-<branch>, copies .env, and runs pnpm install.

name: swarm
author: cj-vana
description: Orchestrate parallel Claude Code worker swarms with protocol-based behavioral governance. Use for complex features, large refactors, or multi-step tasks. Supports behavioral constraints, parallel workers, and persistent state across context compactions.
description_zh: 通过编排并行Claude Code工作节点实现自主长时间编码会话。使用协议化行为治理管理复杂重构和功能开发，支持工作节点协调、依赖跟踪和跨上下文压缩的持久状态。提供基于协议的安全和行为约束，确保自动化编码任务的安全执行。
_original_description: Enables autonomous multi-hour coding sessions by orchestrating parallel Claude Code workers with behavioral protocols. Manages complex refactors and feature development through worker coordination, dependency tracking, and persistent state across context compactions. Provides protocol-based governance to enforce security and behavioral constraints during automated coding tasks.

name: mcp-tester
author: ckorhonen
description: Test and evaluate MCP server tools in the current session. Use when auditing MCP configurations, validating tool quality, testing MCP servers, generating test cases, checking tool descriptions, or analyzing tool efficiency and redundancy.
description_zh: 此技能用于测试和评估Claude会话中的MCP服务器工具。它能发现可用工具、分析设计质量并生成测试用例，专注于MCP配置的审计和工具验证。

name: agent-check
author: claude-world
description: Validate custom agent file format and structure

name: agent-template
author: claude-world
description: Generate custom agent from template

name: auto-loop
author: claude-world
description: TDD-based autonomous development loop with checkpoint recovery and observability changelog

name: changelog
author: claude-world
description: View and manage the runtime changelog for observability

name: check-environment
author: claude-world
description: Verify development environment is ready

name: claude-md-check
author: claude-world
description: Validate CLAUDE.md structure and completeness

name: claude-md-template
author: claude-world
description: Generate CLAUDE.md template for current project

name: code-reviewer
author: claude-world
description: Code review specialist for quality, security, and best practices

name: debugger
author: claude-world
description: Debugging specialist for root cause analysis and problem resolution

name: doc-writer
author: claude-world
description: Documentation specialist for README, API docs, and code comments

name: evolving-loop
author: claude-world
description: Self-Evolving Development Loop - Dynamic skill generation with learning and evolution

name: evolving-status
author: claude-world
description: View Self-Evolving Loop session status, history, and memory metrics

name: focus-problem
author: claude-world
description: Problem analysis using Explore agents

name: handoff-codex
author: claude-world
description: Delegate tasks to Codex CLI to save Claude context

name: handoff-gemini
author: claude-world
description: Delegate tasks to Gemini CLI to save Claude context

name: hook-template
author: claude-world
description: Generate hook script from template

name: hooks-check
author: claude-world
description: Validate hooks configuration and scripts

name: mcp-check
author: claude-world
description: Validate MCP configuration and suggest improvements

name: plan
author: claude-world
description: Create detailed execution plan with task breakdown

name: project-health-check
author: claude-world
description: Complete project health audit (7 checks)

name: project-init
author: claude-world
description: Expert-guided project setup with 6 phases

name: skill-check
author: claude-world
description: Validate skill/command file format and structure

name: skill-template
author: claude-world
description: Generate custom skill/command from template

name: skills
author: claude-world
description: List all available skills (core + custom)

name: smart-commit
author: claude-world
description: Conventional Commits with quality checks

name: test-first
author: claude-world
description: Test-Driven Development (TDD Red-Green-Refactor)

name: test-runner
author: claude-world
description: Test automation specialist for running tests and ensuring coverage

name: workflow
author: claude-world
description: Complete 5-step development workflow

name: 1password
author: clawdbot
description: Set up and use 1Password CLI (op). Use when installing the CLI, enabling desktop app integration, signing in (single or multi-account), or reading/injecting/running secrets via op.
description_zh: 该技能为在Claude中使用1Password CLI提供了结构化工作流，专注于安全的凭证获取。它强制使用tmux会话来处理认证提示，包含防止凭证泄露的防护措施，并引用官方文档进行设置。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured workflow for using 1Password CLI within Claude, focusing on secure secret retrieval. It enforces tmux sessions to handle authentication prompts, includes guardrails against secret exposure, and references official documentation for setup.

name: apple-notes
author: clawdbot
description: Manage Apple Notes via the `memo` CLI on macOS (create, view, edit, delete, search, move, and export notes). Use when a user asks OpenClaw to add a note, list notes, search notes, or manage note folders.
description_zh: 该技能封装了 'memo' CLI 工具，用于从终端管理 Apple Notes。支持创建、查看、编辑、删除、搜索、移动笔记以及导出为 HTML/Markdown 格式。专为需要在命令行或程序中操作 Apple Notes 的 macOS 用户设计。
_original_description: This skill wraps the 'memo' CLI tool to manage Apple Notes from the terminal. It enables creating, viewing, editing, deleting, searching, moving, and exporting notes to HTML/Markdown. It's specifically for macOS users who want to interact with their Apple Notes collection programmatically or via command line.

name: apple-reminders
author: clawdbot
description: Manage Apple Reminders via remindctl CLI (list, add, edit, complete, delete). Supports lists, date filters, and JSON/plain output.
description_zh: 该技能通过 remindctl CLI 提供对 Apple 提醒事项的终端访问，允许开发者从命令行管理任务。支持日期筛选、多种输出格式和列表管理，但仅限于已安装外部工具的 macOS 系统。
_original_description: This skill provides terminal access to Apple Reminders via the remindctl CLI, enabling developers to list, add, edit, complete, and delete reminders from the command line. It supports date filters, multiple output formats (JSON/plain), and list management, but is limited to macOS systems with the external tool installed.

name: bear-notes
author: clawdbot
description: Create, search, and manage Bear notes via grizzly CLI.
description_zh: 该技能通过grizzly工具在macOS上提供Bear笔记的CLI访问。支持从终端直接创建、搜索和管理笔记，具备JSON输出和回调处理功能。
_original_description: This skill provides CLI access to Bear notes on macOS via the grizzly tool. It enables creating, searching, and managing notes directly from the terminal, with JSON output support and callback handling for data retrieval.

name: blogwatcher
author: clawdbot
description: Monitor blogs and RSS/Atom feeds for updates using the blogwatcher CLI.
description_zh: 一个用于追踪博客RSS/Atom订阅更新的命令行工具。提供添加订阅源、扫描新文章、标记已读等基本功能。作为本地订阅聚合器运行，无需云端依赖。
_original_description: A command-line tool for tracking RSS/Atom feed updates from blogs. Provides basic operations like adding feeds, scanning for new articles, and marking items as read. Works as a local feed aggregator without cloud dependencies.

name: bluebubbles
author: clawdbot
description: Use when you need to send or manage iMessages via BlueBubbles (recommended iMessage integration). Calls go through the generic message tool with channel="bluebubbles".
description_zh: 该技能提供了为Clawdbot构建BlueBubbles消息插件的详细指南。它说明了代码结构、内部辅助函数、Webhook处理和配置要求，文档组织清晰，适合开发者进行集成开发。
_original_description: This skill provides instructions for building a BlueBubbles messaging plugin for Clawdbot. It details the code structure, internal helper functions, webhook handling, and configuration requirements. The documentation is well-organized for developers implementing the integration.

name: coding-agent
author: clawdbot
description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.
description_zh: 该技能通过支持PTY的bash命令实现对编程助手（Codex、Claude Code、OpenCode、Pi）的程序化控制。支持后台进程管理、并行任务执行，并与git工作流集成进行代码审查和问题修复。文档重点强调了PTY模式和git仓库初始化等关键要求。
_original_description: This Skill provides programmatic control over coding agents (Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Pi) through bash commands with PTY support. It enables background process management, parallel task execution, and integrates with git workflows for code reviews and issue fixing. The documentation emphasizes critical requirements like PTY mode and git repo initialization.

name: discord
author: clawdbot
description: Discord ops via the message tool (channel=discord).
description_zh: 该技能通过Claude提供全面的Discord服务器管理功能，包括消息处理、反应、投票、贴纸/表情上传、频道管理和审核。它具备细粒度的操作门控以增强安全性，并提供了状态更新和发布投票等常见工作流的实用示例。
_original_description: This skill provides comprehensive Discord server management through Claude, enabling message handling, reactions, polls, sticker/emoji uploads, channel management, and moderation. It features granular action gating for security and includes practical examples for common workflows like status updates and release polls.

name: eightctl
author: clawdbot
description: Control Eight Sleep pods (status, temperature, alarms, schedules).
description_zh: 该技能提供Eight Sleep智能床垫的CLI控制，可调节温度、管理闹钟和设置日程。它封装了非官方API，需要通过配置文件或环境变量进行认证，并需本地安装二进制文件。
_original_description: This skill provides CLI control for Eight Sleep smart mattresses, allowing temperature adjustment, alarm management, and schedule configuration. It wraps an unofficial API and requires local binary installation with authentication via config file or environment variables.

name: github
author: clawdbot
description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use when: (1) checking PR status or CI, (2) creating/commenting on issues, (3) listing/filtering PRs or issues, (4) viewing run logs. NOT for: complex web UI interactions requiring manual browser flows (use browser tooling when available), bulk operations across many repos (script with gh api), or when gh auth is not configured.
description_zh: 该技能封装GitHub CLI (gh)工具，用于检查PR状态、查看工作流运行记录和查询GitHub API。提供了检查CI状态和过滤JSON输出的具体示例。
_original_description: Interact with GitHub using the `gh` CLI. Use `gh issue`, `gh pr`, `gh run`, and `gh api` for issues, PRs, CI runs, and advanced queries.

name: gog
author: clawdbot
description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.
description_zh: 一个用于从终端与 Google Workspace 服务（Gmail、日历、云端硬盘、通讯录、表格、文档）交互的 CLI 工具。提供发送邮件、管理日历事件、操作 Google 表格等常见操作的命令行访问。
_original_description: A CLI tool for interacting with Google Workspace services (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, Docs) from the terminal. It provides command-line access to common operations like sending emails, managing calendar events, and working with Google Sheets.

name: goplaces
author: clawdbot
description: Query Google Places API (New) via the goplaces CLI for text search, place details, resolve, and reviews. Use for human-friendly place lookup or JSON output for scripts.
description_zh: Google Places API的命令行封装工具，提供人类可读的地点搜索结果和JSON输出选项。支持文本搜索、地点详情、位置解析和评价查询。适合需要以编程方式访问地点数据但不想从头构建API客户端的开发者。

name: himalaya
author: clawdbot
description: CLI to manage emails via IMAP/SMTP. Use `himalaya` to list, read, write, reply, forward, search, and organize emails from the terminal. Supports multiple accounts and message composition with MML (MIME Meta Language).
description_zh: 该技能将 Himalaya CLI 电子邮件客户端集成到 Claude 中，支持通过 IMAP/SMTP 在终端管理邮件。提供邮件列表、阅读、撰写、回复、转发、搜索和组织功能。文档包含详细的配置示例、用于撰写富文本邮件的 MML 语法以及多账户支持。

name: imsg
author: clawdbot
description: iMessage/SMS CLI for listing chats, history, and sending messages via Messages.app.
description_zh: 一个用于与 macOS 信息应用交互的命令行工具，支持读取聊天记录、监控对话和直接从终端发送 iMessage/SMS 消息。需要特定的 macOS 权限和设置。
_original_description: iMessage/SMS CLI for listing chats, history, watch, and sending.

name: mcporter
author: clawdbot
description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.
description_zh: 用于直接与MCP服务器交互的CLI工具，支持通过HTTP或stdio方式列出、配置、认证和执行工具。支持临时服务器、配置管理，并能从服务器定义生成CLI和TypeScript接口。

name: notion
author: clawdbot
description: Notion API for creating and managing pages, databases, and blocks.
description_zh: 提供通过curl命令直接访问Notion API的功能，用于创建和管理页面、数据库（数据源）和块。涵盖设置、认证和常见操作，包含针对2025-09-03 API版本的具体示例。

name: obsidian
author: clawdbot
description: Work with Obsidian vaults (plain Markdown notes) and automate via obsidian-cli.
description_zh: 该技能通过obsidian-cli提供对Obsidian知识库的CLI访问，支持笔记的搜索、创建、移动和删除操作。专注于实用的知识库发现和安全文件操作，能自动更新维基链接。专为需要自动化笔记管理的Obsidian高级用户设计。
_original_description: This Skill provides CLI access to Obsidian vaults through obsidian-cli, enabling search, create, move, and delete operations on notes. It focuses on practical vault discovery and safe file operations with wikilink updates. The tool is specifically designed for Obsidian power users who want to automate their note management.
